add-png-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
add-png-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend, insert a PNG image onto a specific page at given coordinates, and save the result as a new PDF.

replace-jpeg-with-bmp.title: Replace JPEG Image with BMP Using PdfContentEditor
replace-jpeg-with-bmp.description: Shows how to replace an existing image on the first page of a PDF with a higher‑resolution BMP file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

overlay-semi-transparent-gif-onto-pdf.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF onto PDF using CompositingParameters
overlay-semi-transparent-gif-onto-pdf.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent GIF over an existing PNG in a PDF by using PdfFileMend with CompositingParameters and a blend mode.

add-word-wrap-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Word‑Wrap Footer to All PDF Pages
add-word-wrap-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use PdfFileMend with FormattedText to add a word‑by‑word wrapped footer to every page of a PDF document.

add-promotional-text-to-specific-pdf-pag.title: Add Promotional Text to Specific PDF Pages
add-promotional-text-to-specific-pdf-pag.description: Shows how to insert the same promotional message on pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend.AddText with an array of page numbers.

add-multi-line-text-custom-spacing-page-.title: Add Multi‑Line Text with Custom Line Spacing to Page 3
add-multi-line-text-custom-spacing-page-.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf Facades to insert a multi‑line text paragraph with custom line spacing into the left margin of the third page of a PDF document.

add-semi-transparent-image-text-watermar.title: Add Semi-Transparent Image and Text Watermark to PDF
add-semi-transparent-image-text-watermar.description: Demonstrates how to combine an image stamp and a formatted text stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to create a semi‑transparent watermark over each page of a PDF.

add-background-image-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image to All PDF Pages
add-background-image-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to overlay a PNG background image on every page of a PDF by retrieving page dimensions and using the PdfFileMend facade to add the image.

add-header-image-to-pdf.title: Add Header Image to PDF Files
add-header-image-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp in a console app to insert a header image into one or more PDF documents.

batch-add-company-logo-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Company Logo to PDFs
batch-add-company-logo-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files and stamp a company logo PNG onto the top‑right corner of each document using Aspose.Pdf facades.

insert-png-signature-on-every-pdf-page.title: Insert PNG Signature on Every PDF Page
insert-png-signature-on-every-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfFileMend to add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of each page in a PDF document.

add-tiff-image-to-last-pdf-page.title: Add TIFF Image to Last PDF Page with PdfFileMend
add-tiff-image-to-last-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend to insert a TIFF image onto the last page of an existing PDF without altering the original page content.

add-image-to-all-pdf-pages-dynamic-posit.title: Add Image to All PDF Pages with Dynamic Positioning
add-image-to-all-pdf-pages-dynamic-posit.description: Loads a PDF, calculates image placement coordinates based on each page's dimensions, and inserts the image into the bottom‑right corner of every page using the PdfFileMend facade.

add-image-to-pdf-with-format-validation.title: Add Image to PDF with Format Validation
add-image-to-pdf-with-format-validation.description: Demonstrates how to validate an image's file format before using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to insert the image into a PDF page.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-with-cleanup.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF with Proper Resource Cleanup
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-with-cleanup.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, add an image stamp to a page, save the changes, and guarantee resource release using a try‑finally block that calls Close() on PdfFileMend.

add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to add multiple images to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend facade while handling missing files and exceptions for each image.

add-image-and-text-to-pdf-with-logging.title: Add Image and Text to PDF with Audit Logging
add-image-and-text-to-pdf-with-logging.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to insert an image and formatted text onto specific PDF pages and log each operation with timestamps for auditing.

add-word-wrapped-paragraph-to-pdf.title: Add Word‑Wrapped Paragraph to PDF Using PdfFileMend
add-word-wrapped-paragraph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to enable the ByWords word‑wrap mode with PdfFileMend and add a long paragraph that automatically wraps within a defined rectangle in a PDF document.

add-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image to Specific PDF Page
add-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert an image onto a chosen page of a PDF document at specified coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

async-add-image-to-pdf.title: Asynchronously Add Image to PDF Using PdfFileMend
async-add-image-to-pdf.description: Shows how to modify a PDF on a background thread by adding an image to the first page with PdfFileMend wrapped in Task.Run for non‑blocking execution.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF to PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save each as an individual PNG file.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages
extract-images-from-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract images from pages 2 through 5 of a PDF and save them as PNG files in a temporary directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs with Page and Index Naming
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, extract all images per page, and save them with filenames that include the original PDF name, page number, and image index.

remove-image-from-pdf-page.title: Remove Image from Specific PDF Page
remove-image-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to delete a particular image on page four of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor. The example loads a PDF, removes the image by its index, and saves the result.

remove-all-images-from-pdf.title: Remove All Images from a PDF
remove-all-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete every image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the modified document to a new file.

replace-low-res-images-with-high-res-png.title: Replace Low-Resolution Images with High-Resolution PNGs in PDF
replace-low-res-images-with-high-res-png.description: Shows how to loop through PDF pages and images using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and replace each low‑resolution image with a corresponding high‑resolution PNG file.

verify-pdf-size-increase-after-adding-im.title: Verify PDF Size Increase After Adding Image
verify-pdf-size-increase-after-adding-im.description: The example creates a blank PDF, adds a PNG image to the first page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend, and asserts that the PDF byte size grows, demonstrating how to validate image insertion with unit tests.
